overall.description: First-person exploration through a dimly lit, decaying medieval manor interior with weathered stone walls and wooden plank floors. The player character walks through connected halls and corridors, passing stationary NPCs and navigating from an entry staircase area through a grand chamber toward a closed wooden door.

events.description: passes by a hooded figure standing near the stone staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit entry corridor toward the interior halls

notable_agents.action: standing still near the staircase wearing medieval clothing

entered.detail: wooden staircase with stone walls ascending to the left
weathered stone support column with chipped surfaces
arched stone doorway leading deeper into the manor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit entry hall of a decaying stone manor. A hooded figure stands near a wooden staircase to the left as the camera walks forward, passing stone pillars and approaching an arched doorway leading deeper into the structure.

events.description: enters the larger hall featuring an ornate iron chandelier and decorative rug
approaches a figure standing motionless in the distant hallway

agents.ego_description: traversing the main hall toward the distant figure at the corridor's end

notable_agents.action: standing motionless in blue clothing at the end of the hall

entered.detail: large ornate iron chandelier hanging from the ceiling with multiple candles
circular decorative rug with intricate patterns on the wooden floor
simple dark wooden bench against the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a grand hall illuminated by an ornate iron chandelier, passing a circular decorative rug on the floor. A wooden bench sits against the right wall as the player approaches a distant figure standing at the far end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor with wall mirror and wooden door

events.description: passes the standing figure and enters the narrower corridor
approaches a closed wooden door at the corridor's end

agents.ego_description: moving down the narrow corridor toward the closed wooden door

entered.detail: oval mirror mounted on the weathered stone wall
heavy wooden door with metal studs at the corridor end
lit wall-mounted torch above the wooden door
blue painted wooden door on the right side of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Passing the distant figure, the camera enters a narrower corridor featuring an oval wall mirror and weathered stone walls. The player approaches a heavy wooden door with a lit wall sconce above it, while a secondary blue door becomes visible on the right as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a decaying medieval manor, moving from a dim entry hall into a grand chamber and finally into a narrow corridor. It begins in a dimly lit stone hall, passing a hooded figure by a wooden staircase and moving between stone pillars toward an arched doorway. As the camera crosses the threshold, the space opens into a grand hall illuminated by an ornate iron chandelier, gliding past a circular decorative rug and a wooden bench toward a distant figure. The scene then shifts into a narrower corridor with weathered stone walls and an oval mirror, moving past the figure toward a heavy wooden door topped with a lit wall sconce. Finally, the camera approaches this door as a secondary blue door becomes visible on the right.
